news.summary: Paramount Group, Inc. disclosed its intention to submit the Form 10-Q for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Their first quarter financial outcomes for 2025 are scheduled to be publicized on April 30, 2025, subsequent to the closure of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. On May 1, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), the Company is set to conduct a conference call and audio webcast.
news.headline: Paramount Group to release first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025 with conference call on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest episode of "When Hope Calls," titled "So Long, Not Goodbye," actors Morgan Kohan and RJ Hatanaka deliver standout performances that have captivated audiences. The show, part of the Great American Family network, premiered its second season to great success on Sunday, with viewers and critics alike praising the emotional depth of the episode. The positive reception comes as a major win for the network, with anticipation and excitement building as the season progresses.
news.headline: Season 2 of "When Hope Calls" is a success, airing the emotional second episode with actors Morgan Kohan and RJ Hatanaka.

news.summary: In Champaign, Illinois on April 10, 2025, Tom Whooley has been promoted to the role of Senior Vice President and Commercial Banker at the INB branch. This promotion comes as a result of his impressive portfolio growth, leadership skills, and active involvement in the local community. Whooley became part of the INB team back in 2017.
news.headline: Tom Whooley promoted to Senior VP and Commercial Banker at INB-Champaign for consistent growth and community involvement since 2017.

news.summary: Stocks of Dell Technologies, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, and NetApp Inc. are experiencing a decline on Thursday after a significant surge on Wednesday. This surge was influenced by President Donald Trump's unexpected announcement of delaying tariffs on non-retaliatory countries. The decision involved imposing a substantial 125% tariff on Chinese imports but was aimed at showing appreciation to allies. Initially, this news boosted risk appetite among investors, particularly in the tech and hardware sectors. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tech hardware stocks fall after tariff-driven rally, Dell (NYSE: DELL), HPE (NYSE: HPE), and NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) trading lower.

news.summary: A recent report states that in the past year, over 1.5 million new jobs were created in the United States. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.9%, the lowest in the last decade. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 3.1% compared to the previous year. The manufacturing sector saw significant growth, adding 300,000 jobs, while the construction industry added 330,000 positions. Overall, the economy seems to be thriving, with various sectors experiencing positive growth and employment opportunities increasing across the country.
news.headline: Spotify feud with songwriters affecting podcasters, impact grows.

news.summary: In honor of their one-year anniversaries, Laundromax locations in New Haven and Hamden, Connecticut will be hosting complimentary wash events for the community. The celebration will take place in New Haven and Hamden to mark the milestone.
news.headline: Laundromax marks 1 year with free wash events at New Haven and Hamden locations. NY, April 10, 2025.

news.summary: The newest Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Treasurer of Allison Transmission (ALSN), a prominent designer and producer of propulsion solutions for commercial and defense vehicles, is Scott Mell. This appointment, effective April 14, 2025, was recently announced, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing its financial leadership team. Allison Transmission continues to strengthen its management with this strategic addition, marking a significant development in its financial operations.
news.headline: Allison Transmission appoints Scott Mell as new CFO, effective April 14, 2025.

news.summary: Today, in Dallas, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) disclosed a dividend of $0.5281 per diluted share for its 8.45% Series D Cumulative Preferred Stock. The Board of Directors approved this dividend, targeted towards the company's shareholders.
news.headline: Ashford Trust declares $0.5281 dividend for 8.45% Series D Preferred Stock in Q2, 2025.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 for each diluted share of the Company's common stock for the second quarter.
news.headline: Braemar Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: BHR) announces $0.05 per share dividend for Q2 2025.
Nuveen CIO: Deep recession unlikely for now, according to Bloomberg.
Anticipating earnings report from major banks - check out Bloomberg for details.

news.summary: Wall Street faced a decline in stocks as economic concerns spread, with major indices dropping significantly. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 500 points, the S&P 500 dropped by 2%, and the Nasdaq Composite saw a decrease of 3%. Investors grappled with uncertainty surrounding economic growth and potential market impacts. The market turbulence was reflected across various sectors, indicating widespread unease among market participants.
news.headline: Wall Street rattled as stocks drop due to economic concerns | More updates on Bloomberg.com  #StockMarket #Economy
China stands firm in trade war with US, refusing to back down. Major economic implications. #China #US #tradeWar

news.summary: In recent data, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, showing an increase in job opportunities for citizens. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a significant surge, with the main index rising by 6% in the last month alone. This growth has resulted in a record-high number of trades, reaching 2.5 million transactions daily. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further economic stability and growth in the market.
news.headline: Concerns about tariffs & fraud could hinder AI funding boom, threatening growth in the sector.

news.summary: Greeley, Colorado - On April 10, 2025, Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation (NASDAQ: PPC) revealed its plans to unveil the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 post the closure of the U.S. market on Wednesday, April 30. The company's top executives are set to delve into these results during a designated conference call and webcast scheduled for Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET). The conference will commence with prepared statements concerning the company's financial and operational performance, followed by an interactive question and answer session involving Pilgrim’s executive management team.
news.headline: Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation to announce Q1 financial results on April 30, 2025, followed by earnings call on May 1 at 7:00 am MT.
Fed’s Collins: Fed policy is still positioned to lower inflation pressures.
Fed’s Collins: I see upside inflation risks, and downside growth risks.
Volatility in Bitcoin, amid uncertain Wall Street conditions.(Character count: 63)

news.summary: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: FRGE), a prominent provider of marketplace infrastructure and investment solutions for the private market, disclosed early financial results and key business metrics for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company highlighted a positive market shift in Q1, fueled by post-election excitement and sizable institutional block trades. The preliminary data indicates a strong performance during this period.
news.headline: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: FRGE) releases preliminary Q1 FY2025 results, citing market improvements and large trades.

news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) also known as PublicSquare, shared that their Chairman and CEO, Michael Seifert, will be partaking in the forthcoming Emerging Growth Conference on April 16, 2025, at 9:40 a.m. Eastern Time. To view the webcast, a link will be provided at investors.publicsquare.com or can be directly accessed at goto.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1705403&tp_key=612b99c876&sti=psqh. Interested individuals are advised to log in for the event.
news.headline: PublicSquare's CEO to present at Emerging Growth Conference on April 16, 2025, at 9:40 a.m. ET. Symbol: PSQH, Link: investors.publicsquare.com.

news.summary: In New York, MoneyLion Inc. revealed that its shareholders have given the green light to the agreement with Gen Digital Inc. The stockholders voted in favor of the deal at a special meeting. The final voting outcomes will soon be documented in a Form 8-K submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. As per the agreement, each existing share of MoneyLion's Class A common stock will be exchanged following the terms detailed. MoneyLion trades on the NYSE under the symbol ML, while Gen Digital is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol GEN.
news.headline: MoneyLion Inc. shareholders approve acquisition by Gen Digital Inc. (NYSE: ML) and (NASDAQ: GEN). Voting results to be filed in Form 8-K.

news.summary: Juniper Networks, a prominent player in secure, AI-driven Networking, is set to unveil its preliminary financial outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, on Thursday, May 1, 2025, following market closure. Owing to the impending merger with Hewlett Packard Enterprise, no conference call is scheduled for May 1, 2025. However, stakeholders can access a press release and CFO Commentary on the corporation's website at http://investor.juniper.net. Juniper Networks trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JNPR.
news.headline: Juniper Networks to announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025 after close, no conference call due to merger with Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

news.summary: StratEdge, a company based in Santee, California, has introduced new high-temperature RF and power packaging at the iMAPS HiTEC & CMSE event. The innovative packaging is designed to maintain reliability even in extreme conditions. This unveiling showcases the company's commitment to cutting-edge technology, such as 5G, and highlights their focus on ensuring performance in challenging environments. It demonstrates their dedication to advancing the industry and meeting the demands of the market.
news.headline: StratEdge showcases high-temp RF & power packaging at iMAPS HiTEC & CMSE in Santee, Calif., promoting reliability.

news.summary: A technology solutions provider for the food industry, Procurant, based in Watsonville, California, unveiled the introduction of Procurant Fresh AI. This artificial intelligence solution is tailored for perishables category management in retail grocery, marking a significant advancement in the industry. Leveraging Procurant's deep knowledge in the perishables sector, Fresh AI aims to enhance efficiency by cutting costs, simplifying decision-making processes, eradicating intricate reporting tasks, and providing precise insights to executives.
news.headline: Procurant launches Procurant Fresh AI for perishables in retail grocery, to cut costs and streamline decision-making.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Guess?, Inc. and WHP Global, partners in owning the NY fashion brand rag & bone, have unveiled a new five-year licensing deal with Sequel. This collaboration, part of the Timex Group, will focus on developing a fresh line of high-end watches for rag & bone. The brand, founded in New York in 2002, has become a prominent figure in American fashion, renowned for its genuine style and influence in the industry.
news.headline: Guess? Inc. and WHP Global partner with Timex Group's division Sequel for a 5-year deal to develop premium watches for rag & bone.

news.summary: In Winona, Minnesota, Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) announced that its board of directors has approved a dividend of $0.44 per share, payable in cash on May 23, 2025, to shareholders of record as of April 25, 2025. Dollar amounts mentioned, except for per share information, are in the millions. Fastenal started paying annual dividends in 1991, semi-annual dividends in 2003, and then expanded to quarterly dividends. The total amount paid out in dividends is undisclosed.
news.headline: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) declares $0.44 per share cash dividend, payable on May 23, 2025 to shareholders of record on April 25, 2025.

news.summary: Enact Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACT), based in Raleigh, North Carolina, disclosed that its first quarter earnings report for 2025 will be made public post-market closure on April 30, 2025. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (ET) to discuss its financial performance in the initial quarter of the year.
news.headline: Enact (Nasdaq: ACT) to release 1st quarter 2025 earnings on April 30, hosting conference call on May 1 at 8am ET.

Fed’s Collins: Rate policy well positioned, holding steady for now seems best.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on April 10, 2025, AZZ Inc., a prominent independent company specializing in hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating solutions, revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.17 per share for the fourth quarter. The company carries the stock symbol NYSE: AZZ.
news.headline: AZZ Inc. (NYSE: AZZ) declares $0.17 per share as Q4 cash dividend, leading provider of galvanizing solutions.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, the monthly distribution for April 2025 was announced by the Board of Directors of FS Credit Opportunities Corp. (NYSE: FSCO). Shareholders will receive $0.0645 per share on April 30, 2025. More details about the distribution can be found...
news.headline: FSCO declares $0.0645 per share distribution for April 2025, to be paid on April 30.

news.summary: A company based in OAK BROOK, Ill. has released its initial First Quarter 2025 results, showing a minimum of $792 million in Adjusted net sales and a minimum of $52 million in Adjusted EBITDA. The Company, identified as TreeHouse Foods, Inc. (NYSE: THS), also restated its 2025 guidance.
news.headline: TreeHouse Foods announces operational enhancements, with Q1 2025 results of $792M in sales and $52M in EBITDA, reaffirming 2025 guidance.

news.summary: Today, Dow (NYSE: DOW) announced the results of its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders in MIDLAND, Mich., disclosing a quarterly dividend of 70 cents per share. In the meeting, Richard K. Davis was re-elected as the independent lead director. Stockholders also voted for Samuel R. Allen to serve on the board of directors.
news.headline: Dow declares quarterly dividend of 70 cents/share at 2025 Annual Stockholder Meeting, Richard K. Davis re-elected lead director.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Cincinnati, the E.W. Scripps Company (NASDAQ: SSP) announced the successful completion of a refinancing initiative. This involved the refinancing of around $110.8 million in existing tranche B-2 term loans.
news.headline: Scripps refinances loans totaling $110.8 million, completing transactions to refinance revolver and term loans.

news.summary: Today, FS KKR Capital Corp. (NYSE: FSK) revealed its intention to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes following the conclusion of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on May 7, 2025. The company is set to present its first quarter 2025 results in an event...
news.headline: FSK to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025, after market close. Conference call to follow.

news.summary: Downers Grove, Illinois-based company Dover (NYSE: DOV) revealed its plan to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 at around 6:00 a.m. Central time (7:00 a.m. Eastern time) on Thursday, April 24, 2025. Subsequently, Dover will conduct a conference call on the same morning.
news.headline: Dover to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 10th, 2025 at 6:00am CT. Conference call to follow on the same day.

news.summary: LSB Industries, Inc. (NYSE: LXU) has recently welcomed Riccardo Bertocco as an independent Board of Directors member, starting from April 9, 2025. Shareholders will have the opportunity to directly elect Mr. Bertocco for the first time during the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting on May 15, 2025. With over 25 years of experience in management consulting, Bertocco's appointment aims to bring valuable expertise to the company.
news.headline: LSB Industries appoints Riccardo Bertocco as Independent Board Member effective April 9, 2025. Stand for election May 15, 2025.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Denver, RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: RMAX), which owns RE/MAX, a top real estate brokerage franchisor, and Motto Mortgage, the sole national mortgage brokerage franchise in the U.S., will unveil...
news.headline: RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RMAX) to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025. Leading franchisor of real estate and mortgage services.

news.summary: Rush Street Interactive, Inc. (NYSE: RSI) revealed plans to unveil its Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call is scheduled for 6:00 pm Eastern Time (5:00 pm Central Time) on the same day to delve into the performance figures.
news.headline: Rush Street Interactive (RSI) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 30 after market close, with a conference call at 6 pm ET.

news.summary: The Cornerstone Total Return Fund, Inc. is planning a 1-for-3 rights offering pending final approval from the SEC, with the record date set for April 21, 2025. Each stockholder will receive one non-transferable right for each share held, with a total of 39,475,678 shares of common stock available for subscription. Fractional shares will not be issued, and the number of rights will be rounded up to the nearest whole number divisible by three. Stockholders can purchase one new share for every three rights at 112% of net asset value or 80% of market price. Additionally, oversubscribing stockholders may receive a 100% over-allotment.
news.headline: Cornerstone Total Return Fund, Inc. plans 1-for-3 rights offering, 39,475,678 shares offered at 112% NAV or 80% market price.

news.summary: The company has decided to recall 189 cases of its eight-ounce Extra Creamy Premium Butter due to elevated levels of coliform bacteria.
news.headline: 189 cases of Cabot Butter recalled due to fecal contamination risk. Elevated coliform bacteria found in 8oz sea-salted variant.
